### New Discussion Point###
Universal healthcare is proposed as a better option since it provides access to healthcare for all citizens regardless of ability to pay. However, many advocates of universal healthcare mention issues such as long wait times and rationinging as potential downsides. Discuss the trade-offs you see between universal and private healthcare.

Given the convenience of privately-funded care compared to potential shortages and lines in universal systems, both approaches have their valid points. It comes down to striking a balance between accessibility and efficiency. How do you weigh the pros and cons in your thoughts? 🏟️⚕️🌟
